vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường của tập thể
vocab.example: In football, building collective resilience is essential so that the whole squad can bounce back after conceding a goal.

vocab.meaning: tư duy tự lực cánh sinh
vocab.example: Individual sports like marathon running demand a self-reliant mindset, as there is no teammate to lean on during the final miles.

vocab.meaning: sự hiệp lực về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Relay races require perfect tactical synergy during the baton exchange to ensure no time is lost.

vocab.meaning: một sự nỗ lực/công việc đơn độc
vocab.example: While swimming is a solitary endeavor in the lane, it requires a different kind of mental preparation compared to team-based matches.

vocab.meaning: động lực giữa các cá nhân (cách mọi người tương tác)
vocab.example: Success in volleyball hinges on positive interpersonal dynamics and clear communication between the players.
In individual sports, the psychological burden of failure rests solely on the shoulders of the lone competitor.
Participating in team sports naturally hones one's conflict resolution skills when disagreements arise on the field.

vocab.meaning: kỷ luật tự giác tỉ mỉ/khắt khe
vocab.example: Gymnasts require meticulous self-discipline to perfect their routines without the constant oversight of a large team.
The beauty of a rowing crew is the shared accountability; everyone must pull their weight to keep the boat on course.

vocab.meaning: quyền tự chủ vô song (tự quyết định hoàn toàn)
vocab.example: Individual athletes enjoy unrivaled autonomy, allowing them to tailor their training schedules exactly to their own bodily needs.
